articles.title: As UFOs go mainstream, the jury is out on what the existence of alien life might mean for religion - Associated Press
articles.summary: As UFOs go mainstream, the jury is out on what the existence of alien life might mean for religion Posted Jun 12, 2026 08:01:58 AM. LOS ANGELES (AP) — In “Disclosure Day,” out Friday, Steven Spielberg is once again inviting audiences to ponder the existence of extraterrestrial life — and the implications it would have for religion on Earth. But Spielberg is hardly the only one making headlines of late about UFOs and the possibility of life on other planets. What was once considered fringe or conspiratorial has in recent months popped up everywhere from the White House to the Catholic Church, as public fascination with unidentified anomalous phenomena — or UAPs, as the government calls them — becomes more mainstream.

de.title: Da UFOs immer beliebter werden, ist sich die Jury nicht einig, was die Existenz außerirdischen Lebens für die Religion bedeuten könnte – Associated Press
de.summary: Da UFOs immer beliebter werden, ist sich die Jury nicht einig, was die Existenz außerirdischen Lebens für die Religion bedeuten könnte. Gepostet am 12. Juni 2026 um 08:01:58 Uhr. LOS ANGELES (AP) – In „Disclosure Day“, der am Freitag erscheint, lädt Steven Spielberg das Publikum erneut dazu ein, über die Existenz außerirdischen Lebens nachzudenken – und über die Auswirkungen, die es auf die Religion auf der Erde haben würde. Aber Spielberg ist nicht der Einzige, der in letzter Zeit Schlagzeilen über UFOs und die Möglichkeit von Leben auf anderen Planeten macht.

articles.title: UAP disclosure advocates set to demand transparency measures Tuesday
articles.summary: On Tuesday, congressional members of the UAP Caucus and whistleblower David Grusch will speak with reporters. They are expected to demand new transparency measures for UAP disclosures. The event is being covered by NewsNation. The article was published on June 7, 2026. No further details about the specific measures or outcomes are provided.

articles.title: UAP forum will let public hear from lawmakers, whistleblowers on disclosure
articles.summary: Former intelligence officer David Grusch told reporters that billions of dollars are being funneled into secret federal programs tied to UFO crash‑retrieval initiatives that are shielded from Congress and the public. He claims the government knows of several dozen cases involving non‑human biologies and holds audio, video, and images of recovered craft. Grusch urged President Donald Trump’s special task force, led by Vice President JD Vance, to investigate the alleged slush funds and called the situation a fraud, waste and abuse issue. Lawmakers from the House Oversight and Government Committee’s Task Force on Declassification of Federal Secrets, including Reps. Burlison, Moskowitz, Luna and Burchett, joined the briefing and called for permanent immunity for insiders and for the UAP Disclosure Act to strengthen whistleblower protections. War Secretary Pete Hegseth said the Trump administration is releasing declassified UFO files and is committed to unprecedented transparency, while noting that a dozen scientists and associates have recently gone missing, died or been murdered.

en.title: UFO whistleblower pushes Vance to investigate alleged billions of federal ‘slush funds’ tied to classified programs
en.summary: Former intelligence officer David Grusch told reporters that billions of dollars are being funneled into secret federal programs tied to UFO crash‑retrieval initiatives that are shielded from Congress and the public. He claims the government knows of several dozen cases involving non‑human biologies and holds audio, video, and images of recovered craft. Grusch urged President Donald Trump’s special task force, led by Vice President JD Vance, to investigate the alleged slush funds and called the situation a fraud, waste and abuse issue.

de.title: UFO-Whistleblower drängt Vance, angebliche Milliarden von „schwarzen Geldern“ des Bundes zu untersuchen, die mit geheimen Programmen in Zusammenhang stehen
de.summary: Der ehemalige Geheimdienstoffizier David Grusch sagte Reportern, dass Milliarden von Dollar in geheime Bundesprogramme fließen, die mit Initiativen zur UFO-Absturzbergung in Verbindung stehen und vor dem Kongress und der Öffentlichkeit geschützt sind. Er behauptet, der Regierung seien mehrere Dutzend Fälle mit nichtmenschlichen Biologien bekannt und sie verfüge über Audio-, Video- und Bildmaterial von geborgenen Fahrzeugen. Grusch forderte die Sondereinsatzgruppe von Präsident Donald Trump unter der Leitung von Vizepräsident JD Vance auf, die angeblichen Schwarzgelder zu untersuchen, und nannte die Situation ein Betrugs-, Verschwendungs- und Missbrauchsproblem.

articles.title: Cosmic Council: Trump creates UFO panel to be advised by Harvard's Avi Loeb
articles.summary: The Trump administration has created a UAP Governance Board to address unidentified anomalous phenomena, holding its first meeting on Tuesday and aiming to improve transparency and interagency coordination. Harvard astrophysicist Avi Loeb will serve as an advisor and head the board’s UAP Science Advisory Council, bringing a scientific perspective to the investigation of UAP incidents. The board will operate without a budget, rely only on declassified information, and may help resolve cases such as the 2023 glowing mothership orb near Cheyenne Mountain, while Loeb notes that about 40 % of observed phenomena remain unexplained by known technology. Loeb has assembled a team of scientists and UFO researchers, including Michael Shermer, Gary Nolan, Kevin Knuth, Matthew Szydagis, and retired Rear Admiral Gallaudet, who has urged the government to prioritize UAP research.

en.title: Cosmic Council: Trump creates UFO panel to be advised by Harvard's Avi Loeb
en.summary: The Trump administration has created a UAP Governance Board to address unidentified anomalous phenomena, holding its first meeting on Tuesday and aiming to improve transparency and interagency coordination. Harvard astrophysicist Avi Loeb will serve as an advisor and head the board’s UAP Science Advisory Council, bringing a scientific perspective to the investigation of UAP incidents.

de.title: Kosmischer Rat: Trump gründet ein UFO-Gremium, das von Harvard-Mitarbeiter Avi Loeb beraten wird
de.summary: Die Trump-Administration hat ein UAP-Governance-Board eingerichtet, um sich mit nicht identifizierten anomalen Phänomenen zu befassen. Die erste Sitzung findet am Dienstag statt und zielt darauf ab, die Transparenz und die Koordination zwischen den Behörden zu verbessern. Der Harvard-Astrophysiker Avi Loeb wird als Berater fungieren und den UAP Science Advisory Council des Vorstands leiten und eine wissenschaftliche Perspektive in die Untersuchung von UAP-Vorfällen einbringen.

articles.title: New science advisory council forms to help US government ‘resolve the UAP mystery’
articles.summary: Investigative journalist Ross Coulthart said a skeptic on the new UAP Science Advisory Council could help the panel, but he worries that Michael Shermer, founder of The Skeptics Society, may be too biased against the topic. Coulthart cited Shermer’s pejorative remarks about whistleblower David Grusch, who claims the government has a secret program to retrieve alien technology, and said he prefers skeptics who are not debunkers. Shermer, who was named to the council, replied that he generally tries to be non‑disparaging and that Grusch deflects when asked for evidence, saying details are classified. The council, which also includes Harvard physicist Avi Loeb, will advise the federal government on how to collect better data on unidentified anomalous phenomena and assess potential national‑security threats. Shermer said most UFO sightings are explainable, wants detailed data to analyze, and believes it is unlikely that extraterrestrials have visited Earth, while offering to join Coulthart on a podcast for a thoughtful conversation.

articles.title: David Grusch Returns To Capitol Steps As UFO Disclosure Fight Moves From Testimony To Action
articles.summary: David Grusch Returns To Capitol Steps As UFO Disclosure Fight Moves From Testimony To Action - USA Herald David Grusch Returns To Capitol Steps As UFO Disclosure Fight David Grusch Returns To Capitol Steps As UFO Disclosure Fight Moves From Testimony To Action On Tuesday, June 9 at 1:00 p. , David Grusch, James Fox, Leslie Kean, bipartisan lawmakers, whistleblowers, journalists, and filmmakers are expected to gather on the steps of the U. The event is being framed as a direct call for declassification, stronger whistleblower protections, and passage of disclosure-related legislation. Grusch, the former intelligence officer who previously testified under oath before Congress, is expected to discuss non-human intelligence-related evidence he says he encountered through classified channels.

articles.title: Newly released UFO files allege China and Russia retrieved downed UAPs and attempted to reverse-engineer them
articles.summary: Newly released UFO files made public on June 12 allege that China and Russia have retrieved downed UAPs and attempted to reverse‑engineer them. Jordan Flowers, executive director of the UAP Disclosure Foundation, said the files show foreign adversaries are engaged in research that could threaten U.S. national security. Flowers cited whistleblower David Grusch, who warned that the U.S. is aware of Russian and Chinese surveillance of its UAP programs and that a global race to reverse‑engineer the objects has extreme national‑security implications. The UAP Disclosure Foundation announced a forum in Washington, D.C., on June 25 to discuss the national‑security, technological, and religious implications of UAP disclosure. A CIA cable from July 2, 2008 placed U.S. assets in Zimbabwe on high alert after a UFO hovered over Harare airport, with beams and rotating lights, sparking debate over whether the craft was a foreign reconnaissance device or an extraterrestrial object.
